metadata.title: ASPM Capability Matrix
metadata.description: Application Security Posture Management vendor capability comparison mapped to Gartner ASPM framework
metadata.methodology: Capabilities assessed via vendor documentation, analyst reports, and independent evaluations. Scores 0-100 per capability.
metadata.framework: Gartner Application Security Posture Management Reference Architecture 2024

capability_definitions.name: Asset Discovery
capability_definitions.description: Automatic discovery and inventory of application assets, APIs, and code repositories

capability_definitions.name: Vulnerability Correlation
capability_definitions.description: Cross-tool deduplication and correlation of findings from SAST, DAST, SCA, and other scanners

capability_definitions.name: Risk-Based Prioritization
capability_definitions.description: AI/ML-driven risk scoring considering exploitability, business context, and reachability

capability_definitions.name: Remediation Orchestration
capability_definitions.description: Automated fix suggestions, PR generation, and developer workflow integration

capability_definitions.name: Policy Enforcement
capability_definitions.description: Custom security policies with automated enforcement across CI/CD pipelines

capability_definitions.name: Compliance Mapping
capability_definitions.description: Mapping findings to regulatory frameworks (SOC2, ISO 27001, PCI-DSS, CRA)

capability_definitions.name: SBOM Management
capability_definitions.description: Software Bill of Materials generation, ingestion, and lifecycle tracking

capability_definitions.name: AI-Generated Code Detection
capability_definitions.description: Ability to identify and flag vulnerabilities specific to AI-generated code patterns

vendors.gartner_recognition: Representative Vendor, Gartner Market Guide for ASPM 2024
vendors.notes: Pioneer in ASPM category; strong correlation engine

vendors.gartner_recognition: Representative Vendor, Gartner Market Guide for ASPM 2024
vendors.notes: Risk graph approach; deep code analysis with design-to-code visibility

vendors.gartner_recognition: Representative Vendor, Gartner Market Guide for ASPM 2024
vendors.notes: Active ASPM with pipeline bill of materials (PBOM)

vendors.gartner_recognition: Representative Vendor, Gartner Market Guide for ASPM 2024
vendors.notes: Complete ASPM with native SAST and SCA scanners
UK-based ASPM with strong compliance mapping for EU regulations
Developer-centric ASPM with strong CI/CD integration

vendors.gartner_recognition: Leader, Gartner Magic Quadrant for Application Security Testing 2024
vendors.notes: Largest developer security vendor; AppRisk is ASPM layer added 2023
Code analysis roots; expanding into ASPM with rules-as-code approach
